releaseArtifact.releaseContract: require package @the-artificial-games/tag-plugin; reject -local; require tag v<package-version>; require package, runtime constant, and manifest versions to match; require archive tag-plugin-<package-version>.tgz

localWrites: pending-device-secrets.json (only while pairing or replacing a device)
connector.lock (ephemeral owner-token lease during state-changing commands)

localState.pendingDeviceSecrets: separate unpaired Ed25519 key until exchange succeeds; does not overwrite an active device during replacement
localState.pairingRecovery: short-lived code, public key, endpoint, device label, connector version, approved fallbacks, private key, and fixed exchange request are stored only in the restricted pending-secret journal until config-first/state-last commit succeeds
localState.syncRecovery: fixed active request plus disjoint chunks of at most 3 events or 2 checkpoints, paced 550 ms apart, until committed; scheduled runs process at most 1000 ingest requests, heartbeat every 50 and once at the end even with backlog
localState.unresolvedModels: at most 2000 normalized content-free records with strict source-model token grammar; known records continue, registry updates drain resolvable entries, and queue size/cumulative overflow are visible
localState.eventIdentity: account-scoped HMAC over content-independent source identity; Codex and Kimi use session/journal plus timestamp occurrence ordinal when no verified provider record ID exists; token/model/mode changes retain the event ID
localState.operationLock: random owner token, open-handle lease renewed every stale-window quarter, live-PID stale-takeover guard, atomic rename/revalidation, and ownership-checked release
localState.pathPrivacy: raw paths are not persisted; installation-keyed HMAC aliases are persisted locally as cursor keys
localState.cursorReplacementDetection: file metadata, complete-line boundary, and rolling prefix digest over allowlisted usage/model/mode fields only; prompt/tool content is never hashed

network.origin: pairing argument, HTTPS required except explicit localhost

retry.strategy: exponential backoff with jitter or bounded standards-compliant Retry-After
retry.permanent4xx: no blind retry; eligible invalid batches are bisected and isolated invalid events are quarantined

scheduler.postInstall: send one immediate signed heartbeat to establish continuity before the first hourly trigger

permissions.windowsSecretAcl: before credential creation restrict the connector directory to one inheritable current-user grant; before pairing traffic explicitly harden the pending secret; before pairing commit harden the final secret; before install re-verify the final secret; fail closed on any error

codingAgentPrompt.websiteGeneratedModeDisclosure: before copying the one-message prompt, disclose that the selected coding-agent provider receives and may retain the short-lived pair code under its normal terms
codingAgentPrompt.saferAlternative: enter the pair code directly in a local terminal after agent review
